violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice dispenser have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The ceiling by the front door is in poor repair and was observed leaking. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Landlord was on premise and was scheduling repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2023
